body:
## Rationale

Gear Price History batch 30 — continues /drummers/[slug]/gear-history surface. All 3 are confirmed absent from the 15-entry gearPriceHistoryDrummers list AND batches 18-29. All have active GSC signals this week.

**Why these three:**
- Bill Ward (Black Sabbath, 1968-present) — GSC signal this week: 'bill ward drum set' 12 impr / 16.67% CTR / pos 7.9. Strong LLM hook: 'How much did Bill Ward's kit cost in 1970 vs today?' Early Sabbath-era vintage gear pricing is highly citable. Kit Overview batch 9 (#3227, just promoted) creates the anchor; gear-history page extends it.
- Shannon Larkin (Godsmack, 2002-present / Ugly Kid Joe) — CTR fix #2927 shipped; active entity. LLM hook: 'What is Shannon Larkin's drum setup worth?' Fills the gear-history gap alongside Kit Overview batch 2 (shipped).
- Paul Mazurkiewicz (Cannibal Corpse, 1988-present) — active entity with 9+ album proposals in queue. LLM hook: 'How has Paul Mazurkiewicz's kit evolved from 1990 to 2024?' Full Cannibal Corpse arc of proposals creates natural cross-link anchor.

**Verified absent from gearPriceHistoryDrummers (15 entries):**
lars-ulrich, joey-jordison, dave-lombardo, mike-portnoy, gene-hoglan, danny-carey, tomas-haake, pete-sandoval, vinnie-paul, igor-cavalera, nicko-mcbrain, matt-greiner, charlie-benante, nick-menza, inferno
Bill Ward: ABSENT. Shannon Larkin: ABSENT. Paul Mazurkiewicz: ABSENT.

**Verified absent from batches 18-29:**
Batch 19: Brann + Kollias + Jaska
Batch 22: Gavin Harrison + Mangini + Bittner
Batch 23: John Otto + Verbeuren + Axenrot
Batch 24: Mario + Hellhammer + Koller
Batch 25: Adler + Erlandsson + Luzier
Batch 27: Bent + Garstka + Halpern
Batch 28: Blake + Cruz + Roddy
Batch 29: Abe + Scott Travis + Jay Weinberg
None of these include Bill Ward, Shannon Larkin, or Paul Mazurkiewicz.

## Files to touch
- api/sitemap.js — add 'bill-ward', 'shannon-larkin', 'paul-mazurkiewicz' to gearPriceHistoryDrummers array
- packages/frontend/data/gearPriceHistory/ (or inline in drummer JS files) — add era cost data for each drummer
- public/llms/gear-history/bill-ward.md (new)
- public/llms/gear-history/shannon-larkin.md (new)
- public/llms/gear-history/paul-mazurkiewicz.md (new)

## Data shape (per pattern from batches 1-29)
```js
// gearPriceHistory entry for bill-ward
{
  slug: 'bill-ward',
  name: 'Bill Ward',
  eras: [
    { year: 1970, album: 'Black Sabbath', estimatedCost: '00-800', notes: 'Ludwig kit, vintage pricing' },
    { year: 1975, album: 'Sabotage', estimatedCost: ',200-1,800', notes: 'Expanded kit' },
    { year: 1978, album: 'Never Say Die!', estimatedCost: ',000-3,000', notes: '...' },
  ]
}
```

## Quality gate
- >= 3 eras per drummer with inflation-adjusted pricing
- >= 300 words per page
- FAQ >= 3 Q&A pairs
- Internal links >= 3 (to album articles, profile page)
- LLM .md files created following gear-history pattern

## Estimated organic uplift
Bill Ward GSC: 12 impr / 16.67% CTR this week. Targets 'Bill Ward drum kit value' / 'Shannon Larkin gear cost' / 'Paul Mazurkiewicz drum setup price' — low competition, directly citable.

## Source GSC query bucket
Serves 'how much does [drummer] drum kit cost' LLM query cluster.

## Verify
1. gearPriceHistoryDrummers in sitemap.js includes bill-ward, shannon-larkin, paul-mazurkiewicz
2. Each drummer has >= 3 price eras
3. Three /llms/gear-history/*.md files created
4. /drummers/{bill-ward,shannon-larkin,paul-mazurkiewicz}/gear-history renders (no 404s)
5. Inflation context provided in each era entry

## Done
Three entries added to gearPriceHistoryDrummers + price history data + LLM markdown files created.
title: SEO batch: Gear price history batch 30 — Bill Ward + Shannon Larkin + Paul Mazurkiewicz (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
